summary:
The provided evidence contains no information about long-read sequencing or associated tools; it only addresses thermal mapping in medical imaging contexts unrelated to genomics. Consequently, claims linking existing visualization tools from imaging studies to long-read sequencing lack supporting basis within these materials.  

Final decision: $\boxed{B}$
